aiCommentCN: 静静等待，是最长的交易时间.
aiCommentEN: Waiting is the longest trade of all.
aiSummaryCN:
【市场情绪】
当前比特币市场情绪较为谨慎。
【情绪信号】
社交媒体讨论热度下降、散户活跃度减少、衍生品多空比偏空。
【短期展望】
未来几天可能维持震荡走势。
【一句提醒】
投资者应保持谨慎，关注市场信号。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
The current bitcoin market sentiment is cautious.
[Key Drivers]
Social media discussion heat decreased, retail investor activity decreased, and derivatives long-short ratio is biased towards short.
[Outlook]
It is likely to maintain a fluctuating trend in the next few days.
[Reminder]
Investors should remain cautious and pay attention to market signals.
